use_cases: Multi-select form inputs where users can choose multiple options from a list
Toggle settings or preferences in application dashboards and configuration panels
Filter selection in e-commerce or data management interfaces
Terms acceptance and consent forms during onboarding flows
Indeterminate state for nested checkbox groups with partial selections
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible checkbox component built with Radix UI primitives featuring three states (checked, unchecked, indeterminate) and three size variants. Implements proper focus-visible states, disabled handling, and dark mode support for inclusive form experiences across applications.
